text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>37. <BIBL><TITLE>Eine Tossanische Bibel</TITLE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":1,"explanation":"The <TITLE> tag was missing its closing bracket ('>'), which prevented the XML parser from recognizing it as a valid opening tag. I have added the '>' to properly encapsulate the tag."}

parsed.explanation: The <TITLE> tag was missing its closing bracket ('>'), which prevented the XML parser from recognizing it as a valid opening tag. I have added the '>' to properly encapsulate the tag.
